sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1281" key="a)diako/reutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδια-κόρευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">undeflowered, virginal</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
